articles.title: 15-Year-Old GhostLock Flaw Enables Root and Container Escape on Most Linux Distros
articles.summary:
Researchers at Nebula Security have disclosed GhostLock (CVE-2026-43499), a 15-year-old Linux kernel flaw that lets any logged-in user take full root control of a machine that has not been patched.

articles.summary: A Microsoft 365 device code phishing campaign has been observed leveraging collaboration-themed lures to take control of victim accounts between the last week of June 2026 and into early July, per findings from ZeroBEC.

articles.title: translateZ()
articles.summary:
The translateZ() function moves an element closer to or farther from the user. 

translateZ() originally handwritten and published with love on CSS-Tricks. You should really get the newsletter as well.

articles.title: translateY()
articles.summary:
The translateY() function shifts an element vertically by the specified amount. 

translateY() originally handwritten and published with love on CSS-Tricks. You should really get the newsletter as well.
